series_metadata.series_description: Records necessary for using the system: user guides, system or sub-system definitions, system flowcharts, program descriptions and documentation, job control or work flow records, system specifications, and input and output specifications.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 3 yeqars discontinuance of system and all system data is destroyed or transferred a new operating environment ; Electronic: 3 yeqars discontinuance of system and all system data is destroyed or transferred a new operating environment
